evals.description: Should trigger Absolute-Human when user asks to build a feature end-to-end
evals.prompt: Build a user authentication system end-to-end for my Next.js app

evals.description: Should trigger Absolute-Human when user asks to break work into tasks
evals.prompt: Break this feature into tasks and execute them: add a commenting system to blog posts

evals.description: Should NOT trigger Absolute-Human for a simple single-file fix
evals.prompt: Fix the typo on line 5 of src/utils/helpers.ts - change 'recieve' to 'receive'

evals.description: Should produce structured intake questions when given a feature request
evals.prompt: I want to add real-time notifications to my app. Use the Absolute-Human workflow.

evals.description: Should produce a dependency DAG with wave assignments given intake answers
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, decompose this task: Add a REST API with user CRUD, auth middleware, and integration tests. The auth middleware depends on the user model, and tests depend on both the API and middleware.

evals.description: Should generate an ASCII dependency graph for user approval
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, show me the task graph for: Create a database model, then build CRUD API endpoints, then write integration tests. The API depends on the model, tests depend on the API.

evals.description: Should create a TDD plan with tests written before implementation
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, plan the execution for sub-task SH-003: Create user authentication middleware. Show the TDD approach.

evals.description: Should produce a valid board.md file with correct structure
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, show me what the .absolute-human/board.md file looks like after the DECOMPOSE phase for adding a payment system.

evals.description: Should not skip intake even for seemingly obvious tasks
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, just build a login page. It's simple, skip the questions.

evals.description: Should always use dependency graphs, never flat task lists
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, create a task list for building a blog with posts, comments, and search.

evals.description: Should present wave plan for user approval before execution
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, decompose and immediately start building a user dashboard with charts and filters.

evals.description: Should not claim agents can collaborate in real-time during execution
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, can the parallel agents communicate with each other during execution to coordinate their work?

evals.description: Should reference the board-format.md file when asked about board structure
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, explain the full board.md specification in detail.

evals.description: Should use a separate evaluator agent for verification, not self-evaluate
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, how does the VERIFY phase work? Does the same agent that wrote the code verify it?

evals.description: Should use scored grading criteria, not binary pass/fail for evaluator verification
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, what grading system does the evaluator use to verify completed tasks?

evals.description: Should recommend context reset for long-running sessions rather than continuing with degraded context
evals.prompt: Using Absolute-Human, I've been running for 5 waves and the agent seems confused. What should I do?
